title: Roadmap: dedupe pre-edit hook injections per session (the agent's #1 token burn)
context: Agent-observed during the wiki build: every Edit/Write re-injects the FULL grounding block (decisions + blast radius, 10-16KB) even when identical to the previous injection — the same decision text landed in the working context 20+ times in one session. The context cost of being grounded competes with the work itself; A/B memory notes agree (win is convergence, not substitution).
decision: Session-aware injection: hash the grounding block per (file, decision-set); on repeat, inject a one-line delta ('grounding unchanged for src/wiki/wiki.ts — dec_x, dec_y still current') instead of the full text. Full block only on first touch or when the underlying records changed.
